---
title: "Launching Knowledge Discovery From Web Client"
---

You can access Knowledge Discovery directly from the Web Client.

To launch Knowledge Discovery from the Web Client:

1.  From your web browser, login to the Web Client.
2.  On the upper right corner, click the Ask Discovery icon.   ![Ask Discovery icon in the Web Client](data:image/png;base64,)   You are directed to the Knowledge Discovery page.Note: The Ask Discovery button should redirect you to the Knowledge Discovery page. If your version of OnBase of OnBase is set up for initial patches of version 25.1 this button will not work.
